comments.author: github-actions[bot]
comments.body:
<!-- tripwires-review -->

## ✅ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-24 18:22:13 PT

No violations found. This PR cleanly removes the `--objective-issue` CLI flag and consolidates objective linking to use session markers exclusively.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered

**Architecture tripwires:**
- "removing an abstract method from a gateway ABC" — triggered by parameter removal, but not applicable (not removing method, just parameter)
- "adding a parameter to an erk exec script without updating calling command" — triggered in reverse (parameter removed, all callers updated)

**CLI tripwires:**
- "adding a parameter to erk exec without updating calling command" — triggered in reverse (parameter removed)
- "modifying CLI commands without regenerating reference docs" — skill reference is auto-generated

**Planning tripwires:**
- "saving a plan linked to an objective" — this PR improves the mechanism by making it automatic via markers

**Testing tripwires:**
- Tests properly updated to use marker files instead of CLI flags

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches

✅ `@patch|monkeypatch\.` - None found
✅ `subprocess\.run\(` - None found (all subprocess calls use proper wrappers)
✅ `os\.chdir\(` - None found
✅ `Path\.home\(\)` - None found in production code (only in test files as expected)
✅ `monkeypatch\.setattr.*Path\.home|monkeypatch.*subprocess\.run` - None found
✅ `monkeypatch\.chdir\(` - None found
✅ `\bimport time\b|time\.sleep\(|datetime\.now\(` - None found
✅ `gt\s+(sync|submit|restack|create|modify)` - None found in modified files

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches

✅ **Parameter removal was properly threaded through all layers** - The `--objective-issue` parameter was removed from:
  - Both exec scripts (plan_save.py and plan_save_to_issue.py)
  - Slash command documentation (.claude/commands/)
  - Skill reference (auto-generated)
  - All test files

✅ **Session marker reading was properly added** - Both scripts now read from `objective_context_marker` using the existing helper function

✅ **Documentation updated consistently** - All references to `--objective-issue` flag were updated to describe the marker-based approach

✅ **Tests updated correctly** - Tests now create marker files instead of passing CLI flags, and assertions verify JSON output includes `objective_issue`

### Violations Summary

No violations detected.

### Files Reviewed

All 16 changed files reviewed:
- `.claude/commands/erk/*.md` (4 files): ✅ Documentation properly updated
- `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md`: ✅ Auto-generated, will update on next generation
- `docs/learned/**/*.md` (5 files): ✅ Documentation properly updated
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/scratch/session_markers.py`: ✅ Docstring updated correctly
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/*.py` (3 files): ✅ Parameter removed, marker reading added
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/*.py` (3 files): ✅ Tests updated to use marker pattern

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-24 18:22:13 PT**: No violations detected. Clean parameter removal with consistent updates across all layers (exec scripts, commands, docs, tests). Marker-based objective linking properly implemented.
- **2026-02-24 18:04:48 PT**: No violations detected. Clean parameter removal with consistent updates across all layers (exec scripts, commands, docs, tests). Marker-based objective linking properly implemented.
- **2026-02-24 18:03:02 PT**: No violations detected. Clean parameter removal with consistent updates across all layers (exec scripts, commands, docs, tests). Marker-based objective linking properly implemented.

</details>
